questions.question: Is Expirely free to use?
questions.answer: Yes, Expirely is completely free for individual users to track their home products.

questions.question: Which platforms is Expirely available on?
questions.answer: Expirely is available on iOS, Android, and via our Web App for seamless tracking across devices.

questions.question: How does barcode scanning work?
questions.answer: Simply point your camera at any product barcode, and Expirely will automatically fetch the details.

questions.question: Can I share lists with family members?
questions.answer: Yes, you can create shared households to manage products together with your family or roommates.

questions.question: Is my data secure?
questions.answer: Absolutely. We use industry-standard encryption to ensure your personal and inventory data is always protected.
